unconscious(GameMap) - Method in class edu.monash.fit2099.engine.actors.Actor
Method that can be executed when the actor is unconscious due to natural causes or accident For example, the actor is unconscious due to them falling into a deep well.
unconscious(GameMap) - Method in class game.Player
Method that can be executed when the player is unconscious due to natural causes or accident

Method that can be executed when the Forester Watcher is unconscious due to natural causes or accident

Method that can be executed when the Hollow Soldier is unconscious due to natural causes or accident

Method that can be executed when the Hollow Soldier is unconscious due to natural causes or accident
unconscious(GameMap) - Method in class game.playerenemy.RedWolf
Method that can be executed when the Hollow Soldier is unconscious due to natural causes or accident
unconscious(GameMap) - Method in class game.playerenemy.WanderingUndead

Overwrites the current points of the attribute with the given points.

Overwrites the current points of the attribute with the given points.

updateDamageMultiplier(float) - Method in class edu.monash.fit2099.engine.actors.Actor
A method for updating the damage multiplier of the actor's intrinsic weapon.
updateDamageMultiplier(float) - Method in class edu.monash.fit2099.engine.weapons.WeaponItem
This method overwrites the existing damage multiplier value with the new one.
updateHitRate(int) - Method in class edu.monash.fit2099.engine.weapons.WeaponItem
This method overwrites the existing hit rate value with the given input.
updateMaximum(Integer) - Method in class edu.monash.fit2099.engine.actors.attributes.BaseActorAttribute
Overwrites the current maximum points of the attribute with the given points.
updateMaximum(T) - Method in interface edu.monash.fit2099.engine.actors.attributes.ActorAttribute
Overwrites the current maximum points of the attribute with the given points.
